description: Celebrate African American heritage and promote equality with our thoughtfully curated email design. Perfectly suited for News, Blog & Magazines, this versatile template can also be utilized for various other purposes. It is designed to spotlight Black History Month, honoring the rich tapestry of Black narratives that have shaped our world. This template serves as a powerful platform for sharing African American stories, promoting understanding, and fostering a sense of unity. Its seasonal appeal makes it perfect for spreading awareness and appreciation during Black History Month, while its timeless design ensures it can be used throughout the year. Whether you're an educator, blogger, or community leader, this email design is a valuable tool in your efforts to honor Black stories.
short_description: Celebrate African American heritage with our versatile email design. Ideal for News, Blog & Magazines, it's perfect for Black History Month and beyond. Share Black stories, promote equality and foster unity with this powerful, seasonal template. Ideal for educators, bloggers, community leaders.

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

html_data:
ALL MONTH LONG - WE ARE HIGHLIGHTING:

BLACK CREATIVES, LEADERS, AND CULTURE

In this four-episode series, we will meet with some of the most influential Black voices, to discuss empowering the Black community, breaking barriers together, and fostering lasting positive change.

START WATCHING
 
 

Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate; only love can do that.

~Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

 

FIND OUT HOW YOU CAN SUPPORT BLACK

CREATIVES AND STORY-TELLERS

READ MORE 
 
 

CONNECT WITH US

© All rights reserved 2021

Changed your mind? You can unsubscribe at any time.
